subcodes.first_line: O thou who art a pilgrim to the sanctuary of the Most Glorious One and the Most Exalted Station, render thanks unto God that thou hast been enabled to turn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائره مطاف ملا ابهی و مقام اعلی شکر کن خدا را که موفق بان شدی که روی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Shrines and Holy places
